name: X-Golf Grand Junction
about: X-Golf Grand Junction is a golf simulator venue located in Grand Junction. The website appears to be inaccessible, limiting detailed information about the facility. Based on the X-Golf brand, it likely offers simulator-based golf experiences with various technology options. The venue is designed for golfers seeking indoor practice or entertainment, though specific features are not currently available online.
why_golfers_like_it: Premium simulator technology for realistic play
Versatile for both practice and social events
Flexible booking for individuals and groups

food_and_drink.notes: Full kitchen and bar service available on-site
Full bar with various beverage options

simulator_hardware.notes: Premium radar-based launch monitor for accurate ball and club tracking

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: No, X-Golf provides clubs for all guests, including left-handed options. You can also bring your own clubs if preferred.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Outside food and drinks are not permitted, but X-Golf offers a full kitchen and bar with various food and beverage options available for purchase.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Typically, 18 holes takes about 1-2 hours depending on simulator usage and group size. Time may vary based on software choice and player skill.

faq.question: Is X-Golf kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, X-Golf welcomes juniors and families. They have youth programs and family-friendly packages available. Children must be accompanied by an adult.
